rules.name: Lowercase
rules.description: Lowercase all letters
rules.tooltip: Convert the entire word to lowercase.

rules.name: Uppercase
rules.description: Uppercase all letters
rules.tooltip: Convert the entire word to uppercase.

rules.name: Capitalize
rules.description: Capitalize first letter, lower rest
rules.tooltip: First character uppercase, rest lowercase.

rules.name: Invert capitalize
rules.description: Lowercase first, upper rest
rules.tooltip: First character lowercase, rest uppercase.

rules.name: Toggle all
rules.description: Toggle case of all characters
rules.tooltip: Swap uppercase to lowercase and vice versa.

rules.name: Toggle at N
rules.description: Toggle case at position N
rules.tooltip: Toggle case of character at position N (0-indexed). N can be 0-9 or A-Z (10-35).

rules.name: Title case
rules.description: Lower all, then upper each word start
rules.tooltip: Split on spaces, capitalize each segment.

rules.name: Append char
rules.description: Append character X to the end
rules.tooltip: Add a single character at the end of the word.

rules.name: Prepend char
rules.description: Prepend character X at the start
rules.tooltip: Add a single character at the beginning of the word.

rules.name: Append string
rules.description: Append the string STR
rules.tooltip: Append a multi-character string to the end.

rules.name: Prepend string
rules.description: Prepend the string STR
rules.tooltip: Prepend a multi-character string. Use Az for simpler form.

rules.name: Delete at N
rules.description: Delete character at position N
rules.tooltip: Remove a single character at 0-indexed position N.

rules.name: Insert at N
rules.description: Insert character X at position N
rules.tooltip: Insert character X before position N.

rules.name: Overwrite at N
rules.description: Overwrite char at position N with X
rules.tooltip: Replace the character at position N with X.

rules.name: Extract range
rules.description: Extract M chars starting at position N
rules.tooltip: Keep only M characters starting from position N. Truncates if shorter.

rules.name: Truncate at N
rules.description: Truncate word at position N
rules.tooltip: Keep only the first N characters.

rules.name: Duplicate first N
rules.description: Duplicate the first character N times
rules.tooltip: Repeat the first character N additional times.

rules.name: Duplicate last N
rules.description: Duplicate the last character N times
rules.tooltip: Repeat the last character N additional times.

rules.name: Bitwise left at N
rules.description: Bitwise shift left char at N
rules.tooltip: Multiply ASCII value of character at position N by 2.

rules.name: Bitwise right at N
rules.description: Bitwise shift right char at N
rules.tooltip: Divide ASCII value of character at position N by 2.

rules.name: Increment at N
rules.description: Increment ASCII of char at N by 1
rules.tooltip: Add 1 to the ASCII code of character at position N.

rules.name: Decrement at N
rules.description: Decrement ASCII of char at N by 1
rules.tooltip: Subtract 1 from the ASCII code of character at position N.

rules.name: Reverse
rules.description: Reverse the entire word
rules.tooltip: Reverse all characters in the word.

rules.name: Rotate left
rules.description: Rotate left: move first char to end
rules.tooltip: Remove the first character and append it to the end.

rules.name: Rotate right
rules.description: Rotate right: move last char to start
rules.tooltip: Remove the last character and prepend it to the start.

rules.name: Reflect
rules.description: Duplicate and reverse (word + reversed)
rules.tooltip: Append the reversed word to itself.

rules.name: Duplicate
rules.description: Duplicate the entire word
rules.tooltip: Repeat the word once.

rules.name: Duplicate N times
rules.description: Duplicate word N times
rules.tooltip: Repeat the word N additional times.

rules.name: Duplicate all
rules.description: Duplicate every character
rules.tooltip: Double each individual character.

rules.name: Replace X with Y
rules.description: Replace all instances of X with Y
rules.tooltip: Global character replacement: every X becomes Y.

rules.name: Purge X
rules.description: Remove all instances of character X
rules.tooltip: Delete every occurrence of character X from the word.

rules.name: Shift case at all
rules.description: Replace all chars with next keyboard shift
rules.tooltip: Toggle the shifted form of each character (e.g. a→A, 1→!).

rules.name: Reject < N+1
rules.description: Reject word if length < N+1
rules.tooltip: Skip this word if its length is less than or equal to N. Use to enforce minimum length.

rules.name: Reject > N-1
rules.description: Reject word if length > N-1
rules.tooltip: Skip this word if its length is greater than or equal to N.

rules.name: Reject with X
rules.description: Reject if word contains char X
rules.tooltip: Skip this word if it contains character X anywhere.

rules.name: Reject without X
rules.description: Reject if word does NOT contain X
rules.tooltip: Skip this word if it does not contain character X.

rules.name: Reject not start X
rules.description: Reject if first char is not X
rules.tooltip: Skip unless the word starts with character X.

rules.name: Reject not end X
rules.description: Reject if last char is not X
rules.tooltip: Skip unless the word ends with character X.

rules.name: Reject no change
rules.description: Reject if word was not modified by prior rules
rules.tooltip: If none of the preceding rules in this chain changed the word, reject it. Useful for selective rule application.

rules.name: Save to mem
rules.description: Save current word to memory (X)
rules.tooltip: Memorize the current state of the word. Used with 4 (append from memory) or 6 (prepend from memory).

rules.name: Append from mem
rules.description: Append the saved word from memory
rules.tooltip: Append the memorized word. Must have used X first.

rules.name: Prepend from mem
rules.description: Prepend the saved word from memory
rules.tooltip: Prepend the memorized word. Must have used X first.

rules.name: Memorize & continue
rules.description: Memorize current word and continue
rules.tooltip: Save the word as-is to memory without stopping rule processing. Same as X but as a single-char alias.
